query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: Two people stand close together in the foreground facing a wide body of water at dusk or dawn. A low distant shoreline with trees and a small horizontal structure such as a bridge or pier spans the middle distance. The sky above is pale with faint pink-tinged light near the horizon on the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two people stand close together in the foreground, their forms streaked and dissolved by deliberate motion blur that smears their bodies and the surrounding scene into soft horizontal trails. The effect creates a dreamlike, ghostlike impression. Behind them, a wide body of water stretches toward a low distant shoreline with trees and a small horizontal structure, all rendered equally soft and indistinct. The pale sky carries faint pink-tinged dusk or dawn light near the right horizon, blending with the overall hazy, impressionistic treatment.
